summary: Analytics Dashboard & Walk-in Sale Layout testing complete. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Analytics Dashboard at /admin/analytics shows KPI strip (8 cards), revenue trend chart, key insights panel, channel performance (Structured 69%/Walk-in 7%/Affiliate 24%), conversion funnel, operations health, top performers. Period selector (7d/30d/90d) works. Walk-in Sale page uses 7/5 grid layout. Data Integrity and Track Order regressions pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard & Walk-in Sale Layout verified. Key features: (1) GET /api/admin/analytics/dashboard?days={7|30|90} returns kpis, channels, revenue_trend, funnel, operations, top_customers, top_sales. (2) KPIs include: total_revenue, revenue_change_pct, total_orders, completion_rate, avg_order_value, pending_confirmations, walkin_revenue_pct, affiliate_revenue_pct. (3) Channels: Structured, Walk-in, Affiliate with revenue, orders, pct. (4) Funnel: quotes, invoices, orders, completed. (5) Operations: stale_orders, overdue_invoices, pending_confirmations. (6) Analytics Dashboard UI at /admin/analytics shows all components with period selector. (7) Analytics link in sidebar under REPORTS & ANALYTICS. (8) Walk-in Sale page at /admin/walk-in-sale uses 7/5 grid (lg:col-span-7 for cart, lg:col-span-5 for customer/payment/summary). (9) Data Integrity at /admin/data-integrity shows health_score, compliance, order health, fulfillment. (10) Track Order at /track-order works.

details: Top customers and top sales returned

Analytics link in sidebar under REPORTS & ANALYTICS
